turns.content: What brings you in today?
Been getting these headaches. They just don't go away. Sometimes I get dizzy too.
When did this start?
Few weeks back, I guess. Maybe a month. Hard to say exactly.
Can you describe the pain or discomfort? Where exactly do you feel it?
Right in the front, sort of behind my eyes. Pounding, like a hammer tapping in my head.
Have you had any fever or chills?
No. Just the headaches and dizzy spells.
What medications are you currently taking?
Just that one for my back. Little white pill. That's it. Nothing else.
Do you have any chronic medical conditions?
Just the back trouble. That's all. Nothing else wrong with me.
Are you allergic to any medications?
Not that I know of. Never had a problem with any pills.
Have you tried anything to relieve the symptoms?
Just some Tylenol when it gets real bad. Doesn't help much though.
Does anything make it better or worse?
Not really. Just sits there. Lifting stuff at work makes it worse, I think.
How has this been affecting your daily life?
Makes it hard to sleep. Hard to focus on the job too. Boss ain't happy.
Do you smoke or drink alcohol?
A beer or two after work sometimes. Don't smoke.
Has anyone in your family had similar problems?
Nobody I can think of. Mom had high blood pressure. That's all I know.
Have you experienced anything like this before?
No. Never had nothing like this before. Just the usual aches from work.
I've explained quite a bit — does that make sense so far?
Yeah. I get it, doc. Whatever you think is best.
On a scale of 1 to 10, how would you rate what you're going through right now — physically, and also emotionally?
Pain's maybe a 3. Dizzy stuff, maybe a 3. Not real bad, just... annoying. Worries me a little, I guess.
Do you have any questions for me?
Nah. Just tell me what to do and I'll do it.
What do you think might be going on?
I dunno. That's why I came here. You tell me.
Is there anything else you think I should know?
No. That's about it. Just the headaches and dizzy spells.
